svg.text: Radio Oracle — Jetson Orin Nano Wiring
LEDs · Push-to-Talk Button · Volume Potentiometer (via ADS1115 I²C ADC)
Pin numbers are BCM (matches oracle/config/settings.py); header position numbers shown in parentheses

g.text: • 3 × 5 mm LED (green / red / amber) + 3 × 330 Ω resistor (¼ W)
• 1 × momentary push-button (12 mm panel-mount works well in a radio enclosure)
• 1 × 10 kΩ linear potentiometer + 1 × ADS1115 I²C ADC breakout
Tip: a rotary encoder on 2 GPIO pins skips the ADC entirely if you don't need a true analog pot.
